movie.title: Kooman (2022) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Malayalam] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Koman (2022) The story takes place in a hilly village on the Kerala-Tamil Nadu border. The story is about a strict police officer who relocates there and the subsequent events that turn his and many other’s lives upside down associated with that police station. Few normal incidents happen in the village, and some from the past suddenly appear to be abnormal. The secrets slowly start unfolding.
